'''togazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobbish|hobbish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-g-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobbish|hobbish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| togazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:togazithi|togazithi]] || [[word:togaziji|togaziji]] || [[word:togazishi|togazishi]] || [[word:togaziki|togaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:togazuthuthu|togazuthuthu]] || [[word:togazujuju|togazujuju]] || [[word:togazushushu|togazushushu]] || [[word:togazukuku|togazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:togazuthu|togazuthu]] || [[word:togazuju|togazuju]] || [[word:togazushu|togazushu]] || [[word:togazuku|togazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:togazufthuf|togazufthuf]] || [[word:togazufjuf|togazufjuf]] || [[word:togazufshuf|togazufshuf]] || [[word:togazufkuf|togazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:togazethe|togazethe]] || [[word:togazeje|togazeje]] || [[word:togazeshe|togazeshe]] || [[word:togazeke|togazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:togazothotho|togazothotho]] || [[word:togazojojo|togazojojo]] || [[word:togazoshosho|togazoshosho]] || [[word:togazokoko|togazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:togazotho|togazotho]] || [[word:togazojo|togazojo]] || [[word:togazosho|togazosho]] || [[word:togazoko|togazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:togazofthof|togazofthof]] || [[word:togazofjof|togazofjof]] || [[word:togazofshof|togazofshof]] || [[word:togazofkof|togazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:togazÃŸfthÃŸf|togazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfjÃŸf|togazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfshÃŸf|togazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfkÃŸf|togazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:togazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|togazÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|togazÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|togazÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|togazÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:togazÃŸfthÃŸf|togazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfjÃŸf|togazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfshÃŸf|togazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfkÃŸf|togazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:togazÃŸfthÃŸf|togazÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfjÃŸf|togazÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfshÃŸf|togazÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:togazÃŸfkÃŸf|togazÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:togazÃḊthÃḊ|togazÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:togazÃḊjÃḊ|togazÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:togazÃḊshÃḊ|togazÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:togazÃḊkÃḊ|togazÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:togazathatha|togazathatha]] || [[word:togazajaja|togazajaja]] || [[word:togazashasha|togazashasha]] || [[word:togazakaka|togazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:togazatha|togazatha]] || [[word:togazaja|togazaja]] || [[word:togazasha|togazasha]] || [[word:togazaka|togazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:togazafthaf|togazafthaf]] || [[word:togazafjaf|togazafjaf]] || [[word:togazafshaf|togazafshaf]] || [[word:togazafkaf|togazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:togazasha|togazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:togazshÃḋsha|togazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togazrosha|togazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togazmusha|togazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:togazyasha|togazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogaznkshÃḋsha|gotogaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogaznkrosha|gotogaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogaznkmusha|gotogaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogaznkyasha|gotogaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:togagazasha|togagazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togagazshÃḋsha|togagazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togagazrosha|togagazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togagazmusha|togagazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togagazyasha|togagazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogagaznkshÃḋsha|gotogagaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogagaznkrosha|gotogagaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogagaznkmusha|gotogagaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogagaznkyasha|gotogagaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:tegÃḊzasha|tegÃḊzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:tegÃḊzshÃḋsha|tegÃḊzshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:tegÃḊzrosha|tegÃḊzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:tegÃḊzmusha|tegÃḊzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:tegÃḊzyasha|tegÃḊzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotegÃḊznkshÃḋsha|gotegÃḊznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotegÃḊznkrosha|gotegÃḊznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotegÃḊznkmusha|gotegÃḊznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotegÃḊznkyasha|gotegÃḊznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:togfazasha|togfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:togfazshÃḋsha|togfazshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:togfazrosha|togfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:togfazmusha|togfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:togfazyasha|togfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotogfaznkshÃḋsha|gotogfaznkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotogfaznkrosha|gotogfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotogfaznkmusha|gotogfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotogfaznkyasha|gotogfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
